summary.key_theme: 公司宣布 10 億美元股票回購計畫與股利發放，展現強勁現金流與管理層對長期成長的信心。

bullish.title: Quanta Services Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend and New $1 Billion Stock Repurchase Program
bullish.reason: 公司宣布高達 10 億美元的股票回購計畫及現金股利，直接提升股東價值，是市場最關注的利多訊號。

bullish.title: CICC Initiates Coverage of Quanta Services (PWR) with Outperform Recommendation
bullish.reason: 中金公司 (CICC) 給予「優於大盤」評級，顯示機構投資人對其在基礎設施領域的成長潛力持正面看法。

bullish.title: Quanta Services, IBD Stock Of The Day, Forges New Buy Point In AI Pullback
bullish.reason: 被評選為當日焦點股，強調其在 AI 資料中心建設的關鍵地位，技術面出現買點訊號。

bullish.title: Joseph Kim Joins Quanta Services Board of Directors
bullish.reason: 任命新董事成員有助於強化公司治理與策略規劃，對長期營運具正面意義。

bullish.title: This Is Why Quanta Services, Inc. (PWR) is one of Louis Navellier’s Top Long-Term Stock Picks
bullish.reason: 知名投資人將其列為長期首選股，增強市場對其基本面的信心。

bearish.title: Quanta Services Weighs US$1b Buyback Against Growth And Valuation Concerns
bearish.reason: 市場擔憂回購計畫可能暗示公司未來成長放緩，或對目前的高估值感到疑慮，屬潛在的負面解讀。

neutral.title: Quanta vs. MasTec: Which AI Infrastructure Stock is the Better Buy?
neutral.reason: 針對同業進行比較分析，未提供明確的買賣建議，僅供投資人參考產業競爭格局。

neutral.title: Quanta Services to Participate in Several Institutional Investor Conferences in May and June
neutral.reason: 參與投資人會議為常規營運活動，旨在增加市場溝通，對股價影響中性。

neutral.title: If You Invested $1000 in Quanta Services a Decade Ago, This is How Much It'd Be Worth Now
neutral.reason: 回顧過去十年績效，屬於歷史數據分析，對當前股價走勢無直接影響。

neutral.title: Comfort Systems vs. Quanta: Which Infrastructure Stock Wins?
neutral.reason: 分析同業競爭，指出 Comfort Systems 在部分指標上略勝一籌，但整體對 PWR 影響有限。
